Home → Discography → The Wonder Years

The Wonder Years

2014 · Self-released

Released through Krayzie Bone’s label The Life Apparel. A more laid-back and melodic effort compared to his rapid-fire earlier work, showing his range as an artist. The album opens with a radio voice referencing a UFO incident (Varginha, 1996), a recurring theme throughout Bizzy Bone’s career. The female rapper Dutchess appears as the only guest artist. The album artwork contains no production credits, while Bizzy himself is listed as executive producer.

"Calling my chauffer, Please get off my sofa"

— Chauffeur
